data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appeal/retake scheduling.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Appeal/retake scheduling'. However, the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. While the linked use case mentions that a candidate can appeal and schedule a retake, there are no concrete details or evidence of how this is executed in the system, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API reads confirming the implementation of appeal/retake scheduling.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the appeal/retake scheduling requirement.
